title: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model in a Claude-built CAD editor
summary: Claude Fable 5 designed a 3D-printable model using a browser-based CAD editor that was itself created by Claude Fable 5. The editor includes a built-in AI copilot that performs the modeling tasks.
writeup: This video shows Claude Fable 5 designing a 3D-printable model inside a browser-based CAD editor that Claude Fable 5 also built. The editor ships with a built-in AI copilot that carries out the modeling work. The demonstration is notable because the same model handles both layers: constructing the design tool and operating it to produce a printable object.
